name: block-assistant
title: Assistant block
description: The flagship Gremorie chat surface: a thread/actions header, a streaming conversation with reasoning, an inline generated artifact, sources and response branches, plus a floating B2B PromptInput composer (context picker, usage meter, mode/model selectors, attachments and voice).
